# Feed: Vista4D teaser thread — 2026-04-25

Eyeline Labs posted a teaser for Vista4D, a 4D reconstruction system that
re-renders monocular video from arbitrary novel camera trajectories. The thread
emphasises that the team conditions a video diffusion model on a 4D point
cloud, so geometry guides generation rather than the other way round.

- 원문: https://x.com/Eyeline-Labs/status/2047600333656826132
- 관련 논문: [arxiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.17835)
